<!--
  Default PR template for all SZL Holdings repos.
  Override per repo by adding a .github/pull_request_template.md to that repo.
-->

## What changed

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change in plain English. -->

## Why

<!-- The motivation. Link the ticket, design doc, or incident. -->

## How was this tested

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual verification (describe steps)
- [ ] CI is green

## Risk & rollback

<!-- What could break? How do we revert? Any feature flag involved? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or PII committed
- [ ] Public-facing copy reviewed for accuracy
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated if user-visible
- [ ] Linked issue closed via `Closes #<n>` if applicable
